title: Simple Utilities
description: A simple Minecraft modpack focusing on the essence of Minecraft, adding simple utilities and game performance.
body:
A simple Minecraft modpack focusing on the essence of Minecraft, adding simple utilities and game performance.

Download

Support

Summary

**Performance** Simple Utilities is faster than in vanilla, thanks to like Sodium, Lithium, and others. **OptiFine features** Simple Utilities supports most OptiFine features, including shaders, connected textures, and zoom. **Works everywhere** Simple Utilities only has client side mods, so you can play on any world or server. **Versions** Simple Utilities will be available for all future versions and for some older ones. **Game type** Simple Utilities uses the Fabric mod loader, which is lightweight, fast, and supports a lot of mods, but there is also forge for those who prefer forge (It won't have the same performance as on the fabric). **Open development** Simple Utilities is open-source, and so are most of its mods. **Suggestions** We welcome user suggestions and collaborate with mod developers to create a better user experience for everyone. ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a541636c3eecbc41d9a12ed8dc3f6c87f0f0b232.png) [Save 15% off of the first month using coupon code TUGA4LIFE or just click here](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=835)
